title: Crack Severity Detection from Mobile Infrastructure Images
description: Developed a crack severity detection module for intelligent road and traffic situation detection using mobile infrastructure image sensors.

title: NPU-based Time-series Big-data Deep Learning Framework
description: Contributed to an integrated software framework for NPU-based computation of time-series deep learning applications.

title: C-ITS Large-scale Data Processing Algorithms
description: Built large-scale C-ITS data processing algorithms and implemented most of the module code (29 out of 35).

title: Pedestrian Safety Risk Evaluation Framework
description: A deep learning framework that evaluates pedestrian potential risk at non-signalized intersections using predicted surrogate safety metrics.
